prompt_text: Create a weekly meal and fitness plan.
response_text:
# Weekly Meal & Fitness Plan

## 🏋️ FITNESS SCHEDULE

| Day | Workout | Duration | Intensity |
|-----|---------|----------|-----------|
| **Monday** | Upper Body Strength | 45 min | High |
| **Tuesday** | Cardio (Running/Cycling) | 30 min | Moderate |
| **Wednesday** | Rest or Yoga | 20-30 min | Low |
| **Thursday** | Lower Body Strength | 45 min | High |
| **Friday** | HIIT Training | 30 min | High |
| **Saturday** | Active Recovery (Walk/Swim) | 30-45 min | Low |
| **Sunday** | Rest Day | — | — |

---

## 🍽️ MEAL PLAN

### **MONDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Oatmeal with berries & almonds
- **Lunch:** Grilled chicken, brown rice, broccoli
- **Dinner:** Baked salmon, sweet potato, asparagus
- **Snack:** Greek yogurt with honey

### **TUESDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Scrambled eggs, whole wheat toast, avocado
- **Lunch:** Turkey sandwich, mixed greens, apple
- **Dinner:** Lean ground beef tacos, beans, salsa
- **Snack:** Protein shake, banana

### **WEDNESDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Greek yogurt parfait with granola
- **Lunch:** Quinoa bowl with chickpeas & vegetables
- **Dinner:** Grilled chicken breast, pasta, marinara
- **Snack:** Almonds, orange

### **THURSDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Smoothie (spinach, protein, berries, almond milk)
- **Lunch:** Tuna salad with olive oil dressing
- **Dinner:** Baked cod, roasted vegetables, rice
- **Snack:** Cottage cheese with pineapple

### **FRIDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Whole grain pancakes with berries
- **Lunch:** Grilled chicken wrap, hummus, vegetables
- **Dinner:** Lean steak, sweet potato, green beans
- **Snack:** Protein bar, almonds

### **SATURDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Veggie omelet with whole wheat toast
- **Lunch:** Lentil soup, side salad
- **Dinner:** Grilled chicken, quinoa, roasted Brussels sprouts
- **Snack:** Greek yogurt, berries

### **SUNDAY**
- **Breakfast:** Avocado toast on whole grain bread
- **Lunch:** Vegetable stir-fry with tofu/chicken
- **Dinner:** Turkey meatballs, whole wheat pasta
- **Snack:** Mixed nuts, fruit

---

## 💡 TIPS FOR SUCCESS

✅ **Hydration:** Drink 8-10 glasses of water daily
✅ **Meal Prep:** Prepare meals on Sunday for the week
✅ **Sleep:** Aim for 7-9 hours nightly
✅ **Flexibility:** Adjust based on your preferences & goals
✅ **Progress:** Track workouts and measurements weekly

---

*Customize this plan based on your dietary restrictions, fitness level, and goals!*
